steps.title: Identify the relationship between the two sentences
steps.content: The first sentence says many butterflies have bold, brightly colored wings. The second sentence introduces species with almost completely colorless, transparent wings. These ideas are opposite—visible versus invisible. The transition must signal contrast.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong transitions and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• Choice A — Similarly,: Signals similarity, but the two sentences describe opposite wing traits. ✗
  • Choice B — Previously,: Signals that something happened earlier in time, which has nothing to do with the logical relationship here. ✗
  • Choice C — In other words,: Signals restatement or clarification, but transparent wings are not a restatement of colorful wings. ✗
  • Choice D — However,: Signals contrast—exactly the relationship between bold colorful wings and colorless transparent wings. ✓
That is the correct answer.
